items.line_en: Alright, look what we need now!

coach.say: Alright, look what we need now!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Alright, / look what we need now!

items.line_en: Where's the one? It's just really, what do we do?

coach.say: Where's the one? It's just really, what do we do?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Where's the one? / It's just really, / what do we do?

items.line_en: We'll be stuck here forever.

coach.say: We'll be stuck here forever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We'll be stuck here forever.

items.line_en: Do not panic, do not panic.

coach.say: Do not panic, do not panic.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do not panic, / do not panic.

items.line_en: We are trained for professionals.

coach.say: We are trained for professionals.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We are trained for professionals.

items.line_en: Now stay calm, we are going around the leaf.

coach.say: Now stay calm, we are going around the leaf.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now stay calm, / we are going around the leaf.

items.line_en: Around the leaf?

coach.say: Around the leaf?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Around the leaf?

items.line_en: I don't think we can do that.

coach.say: I don't think we can do that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't think we can do that.

items.line_en: Oh, nonsense. This is nothing compared to the twig of 93.

coach.say: Oh, nonsense. This is nothing compared to the twig of 93.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / nonsense. / This is nothing compared to the twig of 93.

items.line_en: That's it. That's it. Good.

coach.say: That's it. That's it. Good.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's it. / That's it. / Good.

items.line_en: You're doing great. There you go.

coach.say: You're doing great. There you go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You're doing great. / There you go.

items.line_en: Watch my eyes, don't look away.

coach.say: Watch my eyes, don't look away.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Watch my eyes, / don't look away.

items.line_en: And here's the line again.

coach.say: And here's the line again.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And here's the line again.

items.line_en: Thank you. Thank you, Mr. Soil.

coach.say: Thank you. Thank you, Mr. Soil.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you. / Thank you, / Mr. / Soil.

items.line_en: Good job, everybody.

coach.say: Good job, everybody.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good job, / everybody.

items.line_en: Oh, my, there's quite a gap, Mr. Soil.

coach.say: Oh, my, there's quite a gap, Mr. Soil.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, my, / there's quite a gap, Mr. Soil.

items.line_en: Shouldn't we tell the queen?

coach.say: Shouldn't we tell the queen?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Shouldn't we tell the queen?

items.line_en: I don't think we need to involve the queen in this.

coach.say: I don't think we need to involve the queen in this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't think we need to involve the queen in this.

items.line_en: She's got enough on her plate already.

coach.say: She's got enough on her plate already.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She's got enough on her plate already.

items.line_en: Trading her daughter.

coach.say: Trading her daughter.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Trading her daughter.

items.line_en: Oh, yes, Princess Adam.

coach.say: Oh, yes, Princess Adam.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / yes, / Princess Adam.

items.line_en: The poor, dear.

coach.say: The poor, dear.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The poor, / dear.
